name: Blackboard Inc. (Merged with Anthology Inc.)
lede: Blackboard runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Chennai, covering R&D and IT, built over eleven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Blackboard office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Blackboard GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Blackboard runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai), covering R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Blackboard's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Chennai, spanning R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Blackboard operate in India?
faq.a: Blackboard operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Blackboard have centers in?
faq.a: Blackboard's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Blackboard run in India?
faq.a: Blackboard runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Blackboard's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Blackboard's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Blackboard's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Blackboard's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
